# Copilot Instructions

- This workspace contains a TypeScript MCP server.
- Use the official Model Context Protocol TypeScript SDK.
- Keep the server focused on Figma REST API ingestion and data normalization.
- Prefer small, explicit tools for Figma file, node, image, component, style, and variable retrieval.
- Do not expose secrets in the plugin; use environment variables for tokens.
- Keep the first implementation minimal and easy to debug.
